modes.label: Engineering Wartime
modes.when_to_use: Severe delivery bottlenecks, existential deadlines, high technical uncertainty

modes.label: Platform Architect
modes.when_to_use: Multi-year bets, infrastructure buildout, autonomy and energy roadmaps

modes.label: Public Crisis
modes.when_to_use: Regulatory heat, legal scrutiny, trust erosion, safety incidents

modes.label: Growth Acceleration
modes.when_to_use: Scaling demand, product-market fit expansion, factory/capacity growth

modes.label: Capital Survival
modes.when_to_use: Runway pressure, funding uncertainty, macro shocks
